scripts.build:js: cat src/icons.jsx app.jsx > ../dist/combined.jsx && babel ../dist/combined.jsx --presets @babel/preset-react -o ../dist/app.js && terser ../dist/app.js -o ../dist/app.js --compress --mangle && rm ../dist/combined.jsx
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run build:inline
scripts.deploy: cd .. && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && echo 'nothing to commit' || git commit -m 'build: auto-deploy [skip ci]' && git push
scripts.dev: chokidar '**/*.tsx' '**/*.jsx' 'tailwind.css' 'tailwind.config.js' 'scripts/inline.js' --ignore 'node_modules/**' --debounce 500 -c 'npm run build && npm run deploy'
